name: xdm_organization_duplicate_prevention_overlay
description: Adds tags, smart collections, destination routing rules, duplicate URL/content detection, archive protection, filename conflict previews, missing-file detection, and safe relinking.
commitMessage: Add organization and duplicate prevention workflows
constraints: Require zero warnings and zero errors
Preserve download ownership, resume integrity, media workflows, and smart queues
Persist organization metadata through history and portable download lists
Protect archived entries from automatic history pruning
Never overwrite or delete an unrelated file during relinking
Drain active transfer and persistence work before DownloadManager disposal returns
